recreationGuide.description: How to recreate headers using text-to-figma tools
recreationGuide.sectionHeader: const header = create_frame({ name: 'Section Header', layoutMode: 'HORIZONTAL', itemSpacing: 16, padding: 16, width: 390, horizontalSizing: 'FIXED', verticalSizing: 'HUG' }); set_fills({ nodeId: header.frameId, color: '#2A1139' }); set_layout_align({ nodeId: header.frameId, primaryAxis: 'SPACE_BETWEEN', counterAxis: 'CENTER' }); const title = create_text({ content: 'Section Title', parentId: header.frameId, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: '#FFFFFF' });
recreationGuide.innerPageHeader: const header = create_frame({ name: 'Inner Page Header', layoutMode: 'HORIZONTAL', padding: 16, width: 390, height: 56 }); set_fills({ nodeId: header.frameId, color: '#2A1139' }); set_layout_align({ nodeId: header.frameId, primaryAxis: 'SPACE_BETWEEN', counterAxis: 'CENTER' }); // Add back button (left), title (center), action button (right)
recreationGuide.overlayHeader: const header = create_frame({ name: 'Overlay Header', layoutMode: 'HORIZONTAL', padding: 24, horizontalSizing: 'FILL', height: 64 }); set_fills({ nodeId: header.frameId, color: '#2A1139' }); set_stroke({ nodeId: header.frameId, strokeWeight: 1, strokeColor: '#3D1F50', strokeAlign: 'INSIDE' }); set_layout_align({ nodeId: header.frameId, primaryAxis: 'SPACE_BETWEEN', counterAxis: 'CENTER' }); const title = create_text({ content: 'Modal Title', parentId: header.frameId, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: '#FFFFFF' }); // Add close button (right)
